name: Goblet Squat
description: Hold dumbbell at chest. Feet shoulder-width, toes out. Squat deep keeping knees over toes. Elbows push knees out at bottom.

name: Single Leg Romanian Deadlift
description: Stand on one leg, hinge at hip pushing free leg back. Keep spine neutral. Return by driving hip forward.

name: Copenhagen Plank
description: Side plank with top foot on bench, bottom leg hanging. Best adductor exercise for groin injury prevention.
coaching_cues: Do not let bottom hip drop

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
description: Kneel with feet anchored. Lower body to floor as slowly as possible using hamstrings. Catch with hands.
coaching_cues: As slow as possible on way down

name: Box Jump Landing
description: Step off box, focus on landing softly. Knees track toes, hips back. Hold 2 seconds.

name: Hip Thrust
description: Upper back on bench, barbell across hips. Drive hips up squeezing glutes at top.

name: Lateral Band Walk
description: Band around ankles. Slight squat. Walk sideways 10 steps each direction keeping band taut.
coaching_cues: Do not let band go slack
